creator: joeb1@a1poweruser.com
text:
Created attachment 180962
updated chapter source

Used frontpage to edit the complete 30.3. Wireless Networking chapter source. The attached network-wireless.html.tar.bz2 file contains the complete source of the  
network-wireless.html file that has been updated.

Frontpage puts some stuff at the front of the file that you may want to review.

The credit I added at the beginning is hard coded. You may want to correct that to your standard method.

In the 30.3.6.3. WPA2 Host-based Access Point chapter is the words "Section 30.3.6.2. Host-based Access Point Without Authentication or Encryption.", this needs to become a link.

To my eyes there seems to be an inconsistency in font size across the file and the spacing surrounding the chapter section titles seems off to me.

Available for questions.
